## Summary

Describe the user-visible and technical changes in this PR.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter '!@offisim/desktop' --filter '!@offisim/launcher' test`

## Screenshots / Recordings

If UI changed, include before/after evidence.

## Risks

Call out notable regressions, migration concerns, or follow-up work.
